title: Pi Tree settings
description: Settings for session-tree timestamps and preview layout.

$schema.description: JSON Schema used by editors for this settings file.

treeTimestampMode.description: Timestamp style shown in tree entries.

treeSelectedPreview.description: Show the selected tree entry preview.

treeMaxVisibleLines.description: Maximum visible lines in the tree selector.

treePreviewFullHeight.description: Allow the preview to use the selector's full available height.
